name: Orkas

descFull: Open-source multi-agent AI desktop client — build and command your AI agent team through conversation. A commander LLM dispatches sub-agents in parallel or in series; agents self-evolve via reflection and skill crystallization. Local-first, BYO LLM keys (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini · DeepSeek · Kimi · GLM · Qwen). macOS / Windows / Linux.
